title: Getting Started with DjeLab
description: A brief tour of the DjeLab workspace and its main features

steps.annotation: Welcome to DjeLab! This demo will show you the main features of the workspace.
This is the Files pane. Upload your data files and scripts here, backed by cloud storage.
The Editor lets you write and edit code with syntax highlighting. Perfect for fine-tuning your work.
Visual Spinoza is our visual node editor. Wire nodes together to build programs without typing code.
Live plots and charts display here. Visualize data and simulation results in real time.
Chat with Ibis (free) or Seshat (BYOK). Ask for tours, help, or analysis.
That's the core of DjeLab! Drag panes to rearrange, add more panes, or dive into the tutorials.
